description_long: This object is a pair of flip-flop sandals featuring a light green strap and a sole with a blue and white floral pattern. The straps are Y-shaped and made of flexible material, attached at three points to the sole. The footbed is flat and thin, with a slightly raised edge around the perimeter for minimal support. The sole appears to be made of lightweight foam or rubber, designed for casual wear in warm weather. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for use on sidewalks, in parks, or around urban residential areas. There are no visible logos or brand markings, and the sandals appear to be in new condition.
description: A pair of light green flip-flop sandals with blue and white floral-patterned soles, featuring Y-shaped straps and a flat, thin profile. The design is simple, casual, and suitable for urban outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing both flip-flops with the Y-shaped straps and floral-patterned soles clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin, flat profile of the sole and the gentle curve of the straps.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel area and the attachment points of the straps to the sole.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the flatness of the sole and the strap's attachment.
